title: 350 Elite SOG Commandos Deployed to J&K Forests Amid LOC Alert
detail: India's Jammu and Kashmir Police deployed 350 elite Special Operations Group (SOG) personnel — trained in jungle and mountain warfare — across forest zones in J&K to hunt militants and curb infiltration. The deployment came as intelligence reports flagged active terrorist launch pads across the LOC and concerns over imminent push attempts. Multiple infiltration attempts had already been foiled in Nowshera, Uri, and Bhimber Gali sectors earlier in March.

title: Pakistan President Zardari Demands India Reinstate Indus Waters Treaty
detail: Pakistani President Asif Ali Zardari publicly called on India to immediately reinstate the Indus Waters Treaty, condemning its suspension as a 'weaponization' of shared water resources threatening the food security of millions of Pakistanis. The demand coincided with India's near-completion of the Shahpur Kandi Dam on the Ravi River, which is set to divert water flows away from Pakistan. India placed the 1960 IWT 'in abeyance' in April 2025 following the Pahalgam attack.
